name: Chinese Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large head of Bibb lettuce (8 oz)
1 large head of Boston lettuce (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lettuce and cabbage leaves.
2. Break into bite-size pieces.
3. Place in a plastic bag or tightly covered container.
4. Store in refrigerator 4 to 6 hours or overnight to crisp.
5. Drain water chestnuts, bamboo shoots, and bean sprouts.
6. Rinse with cold water.
7. Drain thoroughly.
8. Thinly slice the water chestnuts.
9. Carefully pat greens dry with a towel.
10. Place in a wooden bowl.
11. Cover with soy French dressing.
12. Toss lightly until all ingredients are coated.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE; CAL: 40
